title: pentameris pallescens
intro: Pentameris pallescens, also known as the pale pentameris, is a species of grass in the family Poaceae. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Pentameris pallescens include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating gastrointestinal problems. The herbal preparation of Pentameris pallescens typically involves making a tea by infusing the dried plant material in hot water.
